reviews.comment:
Tienen que poner más gente para laburar porque se hacen colas largas de autos. Es la última estación antes de pasar a Brasil, y podés comprar reales en los alrededores

(Translated by Google)
They need to hire more staff because there are long lines of cars. It's the last station before crossing into Brazil, and you can buy reais nearby.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOGZfM1FREAE

reviews.comment:
Parador de ingreso y egreso del país  a brasil.buena atención con servicio básicos para el viajero..para alojamiento conviene llamar son pocas habitaciones..

(Translated by Google)
A rest stop for entry and exit to Brazil. Good service with basic amenities for travelers. For accommodation, it's best to call ahead as there are only a few rooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocHUxYxAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, falta personal en hora pico.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but there are not enough staff during peak hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoc3FyaUF3EAE

reviews.comment:
El playero muy atento pero esta solo para atender dos surtidores con cola de autos de más de 1 hora.  Los baños asquerosos, si podes evitalos.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant is very attentive, but he's only there to serve two pumps with lines of cars that stretch for over an hour. The bathrooms are disgusting; avoid them if you can.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaE5HZHlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las veces que pare a cargar combustible, no andaba la app YPF... el resto todo de 10... baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
The times I stopped to refuel, the YPF app wasn't working... everything else was perfect... clean bathrooms
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCXzQ3R0pREAE

El último paso antes de ir o volver del Brasil.... baños tranki. Tiene hotel básico para descansar... presión de los neumáticos...

(Translated by Google)
The last step before going to or returning from Brazil... a relaxing bathroom. There's a basic hotel for resting... tire pressure...
